attacking_style: Limited attacking profile observed; appears to be given token opportunities for exposure rather than genuine winning attempts. No sustained climbing or sprint acceleration evident.
team_tactics: Cofidis uses Thomas for publicity moments (local rider showcases) rather than protected leadership. Appears to be a domestique or lower-tier roster rider given limited team support.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine clear terrain preference. Struggles to follow accelerations on climbs (unable to match Barguil's pace at Tirreno-Adriatico).
vulnerability: Cannot respond to accelerations when pace intensifies on climbs. Large time deficits (1:08+) suggest struggles in mountain stages. Lacks finishing power for competitive results.
key_patterns: Given symbolic breakaway opportunities rather than serious winning chances (Tour, Tirreno observations)
Unable to follow when stronger climbers accelerate on decisive moments
Team prioritizes PR value over competitive positioning for this rider
form_trajectory: neutral: Limited data but shows consistent domestique role without competitive results across Grand Tour and stage race
